introduction: Season 2 of The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish was originally scheduled for release around May 2025, but due to unexpected delays, the exact release date has yet to be confirmed.The good news is that The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish is still in active production, and an exciting announcement is expected in the near future.Stay up-to-date with all the production updates and be the first to know when the release date is announced. Download Rivr on your iPhone or iPad, and add The Fairly OddParents: A New Wish to your favorites.
